text: The other day Tyler and I were digging deep in this mine having a competition to see who could find the biggest crystal. And you won't believe what we found as we dug deeper down into the earth, We got in between this crevice which was a perfect place for little crystals To form and we started pulling out chunks of smokey quartz Which is A good sign after finding A few small crystals it Was tyler's turn In the hole He managed To discover the biggest crystal of the day so far He's definitely got me beat now Tyler kept scraping down in The hole right behind where he found The last crystal and He found another one even bigger It turned out to be an absolutely gorgeous smokey amethyst scepter I was pretty jealous Of this one but it's okay because Its my turn In the hole Now Right behind The last crystal there was another one sticking out And it Was just getting bigger and Bigger as I kept digging After chiseling some more It Was time to pull It Out We sprayed off Some of that thick red clay In it revealed the gorgeous amethyst crystals underneath Definitely gonna head back
